parsed_review.summary: CP00-677 (RP22 External Integrations I UI workflow permission/audit bridge, Risk B, 40 units RP22.P04.M03.S21-RP22.P04.M05.S16) passes hardened read-only review with no findings. Source inspection via Read/Grep/Glob confirms the pack is descriptor-only, no-write, no-real-data, and runtime-closed: the CP677 binding, requirements, descriptor factory (createExternalIntegrationsICp677UiWorkflowPermissionAuditBridgeDescriptor), Hermes/Claude packets, and closeout handoff in registry.js/service.js are internally consistent, and validateExternalIntegrationsICp677UiWorkflowPermissionAuditBridgeDescriptor plus the coverage validator enforce descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, raw_payload_included=false, unauthorized_count_included=false, and all runtime/credential/permission/audit/UI/Hermes boundaries=false. Coverage matches the baseline and prompt exactly (ui:18, implementation:11, claude_review:3, security_audit:4, fixture:2, test:1, hermes_evidence:1; M03:2/M04:22/M05:16). model.test.js asserts descriptor validity, no-runtime, read-only and non-final Claude, and handoff to CP00-678/RP22.P04.M05.S17; both contract files project CP00-677 as current_pack and pass the projection validator. Authority boundary holds: Claude is read-only and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false), and Hermes is a deterministic control-plane review-packet/receipt pattern only (hermes_runtime_opened=false, runtime_receipt_emitted=false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false) — not product runtime. Evidence is honest, not over-claimed: manifest, adjudication, and construction-inspection report production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status in_progress, pending exactly one valid hardened review; command-evidence records 22/22 validation commands at exit 0; readiness auth_preflight passed (exit 0, 1226-byte valid-JSON stdout, no 0-byte/malformed/tool-call-shaped/auth-failure evidence); no prior invalid review attempts exist. The live plan and queue are consistent (live_latest CP00-677, next CP00-678 at RP22.P04.M05.S17), and unrelated dirty/untracked files (LDIP results, workbook docs, progress-control-room) are correctly scoped out and not inferred into the pack. The production_ready flag external_integrations_i_ui_workflow_permission_audit_bridge_descriptor_verified is correctly gated on this review and is supportable; this PASS receipt does not constitute final human/enterprise-trust approval, which remains outside this receipt and is not claimed by the pack. blocks_goal_closeout is false for this CP closeout goal only.
